content: Spotless room and the bed was incredibly comfortable.
Check-in took forever and the elevator was out of service.
Great location near the beach. Staff helped us book tours.
Wi-Fi was unreliable and the air conditioning was noisy.
Breakfast buffet had plenty of options and fresh fruit daily.
The pool area was closed for maintenance with no prior notice.
Concierge arranged a late checkout without any hassle.
Room smelled musty and housekeeping skipped our room one day.
Beautiful lobby and friendly reception team on arrival.
Average stay. Nothing bad but nothing memorable either.
